summary: Executed backend pytest regression and frontend Playwright integration checks for dashboard, vouchers, sub-vendo VLANs, GPIO behavior, reports, config export, and route navigation. Core workflows are working.
action_items: Split /app/backend/server.py into smaller modules (currently >700 lines) for maintainability and safer iteration.
Add explicit loading/error UI states for data-fetching pages (Dashboard, Reports, Config, GPIO, Vouchers, VLANs) to avoid transient blank/zero-value confusion during slow responses.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is monolithic (~900+ lines), raising change-risk and reducing testability; break by domain routers/services.
Most pages fetch data without explicit loading/failure placeholders, which can temporarily render empty/default values and mask request latency/failures in UI.
seed_data_creation: Created test entities via APIs: TEST_vlan_*, TEST_profile_* and UI-created TEST_UI_*, TEST_VPRO_* records.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite is available at /app/backend/tests/test_pisofi_api.py and currently green (7/7). UI flows for vouchers/sub-vendo/GPIO/reports/config were validated against public URL with data-testid selectors and passed.
rca of the issue: No functional backend/frontend blocking defects reproduced in this run. Earlier zero/blank readings on reports/config during fast navigation were timing-related UI fetch latency; values rendered correctly after standard wait/refresh.
